## Summary

Describe the user-visible behavior and the reason for the change.

## Verification

List the commands, hardware, macOS version, and display used for verification.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] EDR lifecycle changes were tested with `make test-edr` on compatible hardware.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and limitations are documented.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for notable changes.
- [ ] No build products, credentials, certificates, or user-specific settings are included.
